backtest_intent.name: c.800-crypto-multicanal-v17-rerun
backtest_intent.rationale: Re-execute v17 (v15 base + trail 3%) hyperparameters via qc_lite to obtain fresh QC Cloud metrics for tracker #7575 tranche 2/9 evidence archive. Same code as previous v17 (committed pre-c.800-upload), date range 2015-01-01 to 2024-12-31 (10y strict).

backtest.duration_seconds_estimate: ~15-30 seconds (cache hit on identical v17 algorithm)

delta_vs_prior.interpretation: Identical result vs prior 82fae2cd (2026-06-14) confirms deterministic reproducibility of v17 strategy on QC Cloud Lean Engine. Same code + same hyperparameters + same date range = same metrics. ProbabilisticSharpeRatio recomputed (1.551% vs 12.951%), expected since it uses random trial distributions. Equity outcomes identical: Sharpe 0.333 / CAGR 4.589% / MaxDD 14.100% / TotalNetProfit 56.704% / 3653 dates / 69 orders.

compliance.l528_l529_md_only: 0 churn notebook, 0 churn PNG, 0 churn Lean
compliance.l528_l529_atomic: +N evidence archive + README update only (main.py uploaded to QC Cloud, NOT committed locally)
compliance.sota_prong_a: vrai QC Cloud (qc_lite MCP), 0 mock fallback (lesson #7952/#7953)
compliance.g_var_3_rotation: c.799 qc-backtest intra-ML-XGBoost -> c.800 qc-backtest intra-Crypto-MultiCanal = 2 dossiers QC distincts (rotation ok intra-genre mais intra-dossier-distinct, G-VAR-3 cross-projet)
